examples: Objective: to explore the operating skill of laparoscopic appendectomy (la).
Appendectomy can be performed several weeks later after the infection is under control.
If your appendectomy was done laparoscopically, limit your activity for the first three to five days after surgery.
Someone filing a claim for an appendectomy cannot return the next year with another appendectomy.
George Vanderbilt died just two years later, at age 51, of complications from an appendectomy.
